title: centaurea langei subsp. langei
intro: Centaurea langei subsp. langei, also known as Lange's knapweed, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly its aerial parts, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing pain, inflammation, and improving overall health. Centaurea langei subsp. langei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
